items.title: Licochalcone a enhances cognitive resilience in APP/PS1 Mice by modulating glucose metabolism, Aβ burden, and neuroinflammation.
items.authors: Marina Carrasco; Laura Guzman; Emma Barroso; Jordi Olloquequi; Amanda Cano; Jesús Ureña; Ester Verdaguer; Rafel Prohens
items.abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a complex neurodegenerative disorder. Current therapeutic approaches targeting a single pathway have shown limited efficacy, highlighting the need for multi-target interventions. Licochalcone A (LCA), a chalcone of licorice root, has demonstrated anti-inflammatory and antidiabetic properties. However, its potential neuroprotective mechanisms in AD remain unclear. The present study aims to elucidate the beneficial effect of LCA against cognitive decline in an AD mouse model. For this purpose, five-month-old APPswe/PS1dE9 (APP/PS1) mice received intraperitoneal LCA (15 mg·kg-1·day-1) treatment for 4 weeks. Afterwards, cognitive function was assessed using Morris water maze (MWM) and Novel object recognition test (NORT). Metabolism was evaluated through glucose and insulin tolerance tests. Biochemical markers of synapses, neurogenesis, metabolism, Amyloid-β (Aβ) burden and neuroinflammation were analyzed using immunohistochemistry, Thioflavin-S staining, Golgi staining, Western blot, ELISA and RT-PCR. The results demonstrated that LCA significantly improved long-term memory in APP/PS1 mice, through MWM and NORT, accompanied by an increased dendritic spine density, upregulated PSD95 and spinophilin levels, and enhanced Ki67-positive cells in the hippocampus. Moreover, LCA treatment ameliorated glucose tolerance and initial insulin response while increasing Insr expression and GLUT1 protein levels. Furthermore, LCA-treated APP/PS1 mice showed reduced plaque burden and Aβ42 levels. Alongside, LCA demonstrated its anti-inflammatory effect by reducing glial reactivity, and Trem2 expression. In conclusion, the present study demonstrates the multiple therapeutic effects of LCA in APP/PS1 mice by simultaneously modulating glucose metabolism, reducing Aβ accumulation and attenuating neuroinflammation, ultimately enhancing cognitive resilience. These findings establish LCA as a promising multi-target compound for AD treatment.

items.title_cn: 甘草查耳酮 a 通过调节葡萄糖代谢、Aβ 负荷和神经炎症来增强 APP/PS1 小鼠的认知弹性。
items.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病（AD）是一种复杂的神经退行性疾病。目前针对单一途径的治疗方法显示出有限的疗效，凸显了多靶点干预的必要性。 Licochalcone A (LCA) 是一种甘草根的查耳酮，具有抗炎和抗糖尿病特性。然而，其在 AD 中的潜在神经保护机制仍不清楚。本研究旨在阐明 LCA 对 AD 小鼠模型认知能力下降的有益作用。为此，5 个月大的 APPswe/PS1dE9 (APP/PS1) 小鼠接受腹腔 LCA (15 mg·kg-1·day-1) 治疗 4 周。随后，使用莫里斯水迷宫（MWM）和新物体识别测试（NORT）评估认知功能。通过葡萄糖和胰岛素耐量测试评估代谢。使用免疫组织化学、硫磺素-S 染色、高尔基体染色、蛋白质印迹、ELISA 和 RT-PCR 分析突触、神经发生、代谢、淀粉样蛋白-β (Aβ) 负荷和神经炎症的生化标志物。结果表明，LCA 通过 MWM 和 NORT 显着改善 APP/PS1 小鼠的长期记忆，同时增加树突棘密度，上调 PSD95 和 spinophilin 水平，并增强海马中的 Ki67 阳性细胞。此外，LCA 治疗改善了葡萄糖耐量和初始胰岛素反应，同时增加了 Insr 表达和 GLUT1 蛋白水平。此外，LCA 治疗的 APP/PS1 小鼠显示出斑块负荷和 Aβ42 水平降低。此外，LCA 通过降低神经胶质反应性和 Trem2 表达来证明其抗炎作用。总之，本研究证明了 LCA 对 APP/PS1 小鼠的多重治疗作用，通过同时调节葡萄糖代谢、减少 Aβ 积累和减轻神经炎症，最终增强认知弹性。这些发现表明 LCA 是一种有前途的 AD 治疗多靶点化合物。

items.title: IQGAP3 bridges matrix stiffness with glioma stem cell maintenance and radioresistance by stabilizing SOX2.
items.authors: Po Zhang; Weichi Wu; Tengfei Huang; Xujia Wu; Donghai Wang; Huairui Yuan; Suchet Taori; Fanen Yuan
items.abstract: Drivers of therapeutic resistance in cancer include evolving tumor cell heterogeneity and the tumor microenvironment (TME). We find that increased matrix stiffness promotes radioresistance in glioblastoma (GBM) and maintains tumor cell hierarchies. Differential gene expression reveals that stiff matrices induce expression of IQGAP3 (IQ Motif Containing GTPase Activating Protein 3) through YAP1 and TEAD transcription factors in GBM stem cells (GSCs). IQGAP3 promotes GSC self-renewal and survival upon radiation treatment through binding and stabilization of core stem cell transcription factor, SOX2. Targeting IQGAP3 reduces SOX2 protein levels in vitro and in vivo, increasing GSC radiosensitivity and inhibiting tumor growth. Structure-function drug screening of FDA-approved agents blocking IQGAP3-SOX2 binding identifies trimetrexate as a brain penetrant pharmacologic disruptor of IQGAP3 function in radioresistance, sensitizing GSCs to radiotherapy. These results identify molecular underpinnings for biomechanical promotion of cancer stem cell maintenance and therapeutic resistance, informing therapeutic strategies to augment efficacy of radiotherapy.
items.title_en: IQGAP3 bridges matrix stiffness with glioma stem cell maintenance and radioresistance by stabilizing SOX2.
items.title_cn: IQGAP3 通过稳定 SOX2 将基质硬度与神经胶质瘤干细胞维持和放射抗性联系起来。
items.abstract_cn: 癌症治疗耐药性的驱动因素包括不断变化的肿瘤细胞异质性和肿瘤微环境（TME）。我们发现增加的基质硬度可促进胶质母细胞瘤（GBM）的放射抗性并维持肿瘤细胞的层次结构。差异基因表达表明，刚性基质通过 YAP1 和 TEAD 转录因子在 GBM 干细胞 (GSC) 中诱导 IQGAP3（含有 GTP 酶激活蛋白 3 的 IQ 基序）的表达。 IQGAP3 通过结合和稳定核心干细胞转录因子 SOX2，促进放疗后 GSC 的自我更新和存活。靶向 IQGAP3 可降低体外和体内 SOX2 蛋白水平，增加 GSC 放射敏感性并抑制肿瘤生长。对 FDA 批准的阻断 IQGAP3-SOX2 结合的药物进行结构功能药物筛选，确定曲美曲沙是 IQGAP3 放射抗性功能的脑渗透药理学干扰剂，使 GSC 对放射治疗敏感。这些结果确定了促进癌症干细胞维持和治疗抵抗的生物力学的分子基础，为增强放射治疗功效的治疗策略提供了信息。

items.title: Trichostatin A-primed spinal cord organoids alleviate oxidative stress and improve recovery after spinal cord injury involving the NRF2/HO-1 signaling pathway.
items.authors: Yicong Wang; Kun Wang; Ziru Wang; Yiheng Li; Shuai Jiang; Tinggang Xu; Min Yang; Yifan Gu
items.abstract: Oxidative stress represents a fundamental pathological driver of the secondary injury cascade following traumatic spinal cord injury (SCI). Although the pan-histone deacetylase inhibitor Trichostatin A (TSA) exhibits neuroprotective properties in various contexts, its capacity to modulate the endogenous NRF2/HO-1 antioxidant defense system within the human spinal cord microenvironment remains to be elucidated. In this study, we utilized human induced pluripotent stem cell-derived spinal cord organoids (hSCOs) as a sophisticated, human-relevant platform to investigate these mechanisms. In vitro analyses revealed that TSA preconditioning significantly bolsters the resilience of hSCOs against oxidative damage, manifesting as enhanced cellular viability, diminished accumulation of reactive oxygen species and malondialdehyde, and elevated superoxide dismutase activity. Mechanistic evaluations suggested that this protection is mediated by NRF2 nuclear translocation and subsequent HO-1 upregulation, an effect completely reversed following the pharmacological inhibition of NRF2. Furthermore, the transplantation of TSA-preconditioned hSCOs, encapsulated within a GelMA hydrogel, into a rat contusion model led to marked structural and functional restoration. Compared to untreated organoid grafts, the TSA-primed hSCOs significantly promoted motor function recovery, diminished lesion cavitation, and enhanced neuronal survival, while simultaneously attenuating glial scarring, neuroinflammation, and axonal degeneration. These findings indicate that pharmacological priming with TSA optimizes the therapeutic efficacy of organoid transplantation in a manner involving NRF2/HO-1 activation, establishing a highly promising combinatorial strategy for clinical neural regeneration.
items.title_en: Trichostatin A-primed spinal cord organoids alleviate oxidative stress and improve recovery after spinal cord injury involving the NRF2/HO-1 signaling pathway.
items.title_cn: 曲古抑菌素 A 引发的脊髓类器官可减轻氧化应激并改善涉及 NRF2/HO-1 信号通路的脊髓损伤后的恢复。
items.abstract_cn: 氧化应激是创伤性脊髓损伤 (SCI) 后继发性损伤级联的基本病理驱动因素。尽管全组蛋白脱乙酰酶抑制剂曲古抑菌素 A (TSA) 在各种情况下表现出神经保护特性，但其在人脊髓微环境中调节内源性 NRF2/HO-1 抗氧化防御系统的能力仍有待阐明。在这项研究中，我们利用人类诱导多能干细胞来源的脊髓类器官（hSCO）作为复杂的、与人类相关的平台来研究这些机制。体外分析表明，TSA 预处理显着增强了 hSCO 对抗氧化损伤的能力，表现为细胞活力增强、活性氧和丙二醛积累减少以及超氧化物歧化酶活性升高。机制评估表明，这种保护是由 NRF2 核转位和随后的 HO-1 上调介导的，在药理学抑制 NRF2 后，这种效应完全逆转。此外，将封装在 GelMA 水凝胶内的 TSA 预处理的 hSCO 移植到大鼠挫伤模型中，导致结构和功能显着恢复。与未经处理的类器官移植物相比，TSA 引发的 hSCO 显着促进运动功能恢复、减少病变空洞并提高神经元存活率，同时减轻神经胶质疤痕、神经炎症和轴突变性。这些发现表明，TSA 的药理学启动通过涉及 NRF2/HO-1 激活的方式优化了类器官移植的治疗效果，为临床神经再生建立了一种非常有前途的组合策略。

核心发现：氧化应激是创伤性脊髓损伤 (SCI) 后继发性损伤级联的基本病理驱动因素。尽管全组蛋白脱乙酰酶抑制剂曲古抑菌素 A (TSA) 在各种情况下表现出神经保护特性，但其在人脊髓微环境中调节内源性 NRF2/HO-1 抗氧化防御系统的能力仍有待阐明。在这项研究中，我们利用人类诱导多能干细胞来源的脊髓类器官（hSCO）作为复杂的、与人类相关的平台来研究这些机制。体外分析表明，TSA 预处理显着增强了 hSCO 对抗氧化损伤的能力，表现为细胞活力增强、活性氧和丙二醛积累减少以及超氧化物歧化酶活性升高。机制评估表明，这种保护是由 NRF2 核转位和随后的 HO-1 上调介导的，在药理学抑制 NRF2 后，这种效应完全逆转。此外，将封装在 GelMA 水凝胶内的 TSA 预处理的 hSCO 移植到大鼠挫伤模型中，导致结构和功能显着恢复。与未经处理的类器官移植物相比，TSA 引发的 hSCO 显着促进运动功能恢复、减少病变空洞并提高神经元存活率，同时减轻神经胶质疤痕、神经炎症和轴突变性。这些发现表明，TSA 的药理学启动通过涉及 NRF2/HO-1 激活的方式优化了类器官移植的治疗效果，为临床神经再生建立了一种非常有前途的组合策略。

items.title: Microglial galectin-3 disrupts parvalbumin interneurons and hippocampal synchrony, driving cognitive deficits.
items.authors: Min Jia; Hua Shao; Si-Qi Ma; Wen-Xue Liu; Meng Cai; Tong Zhu; Shan Xu; Gui-Zhou Li
items.abstract: Sepsis-associated encephalopathy (SAE), a devastating neurological complication of systemic inflammation, affects approximately 70% of patients with sepsis. It not only increases mortality but also leaves survivors with persistent cognitive deficits. However, the mechanisms underlying SAE progression remain incompletely understood. Here, using a lipopolysaccharide (LPS)-induced mouse model of SAE, we identify microglial galectin-3 (Gal-3) as a central pathogenic mediator driving systemic inflammation-induced cognitive impairment. Mechanistically, systemic LPS challenge robustly upregulates microglial Gal-3, which in turn activates Toll-like receptor 2 (TLR2) signaling and promotes NLRP3/AIM2 inflammasome assembly. This microglia-driven inflammatory cascade substantially exacerbates local oxidative stress, leading to selective structural and functional impairment of hippocampal parvalbumin (PV) interneurons. Dysfunction of these critical interneurons disrupts theta/gamma oscillations, impairs excitatory/inhibitory (E/I) balance and synaptic plasticity, and ultimately results in severe cognitive decline. Supporting this pathogenic cascade, pharmacological inhibition of Gal-3 with TD139 effectively suppresses TLR2/inflammasome activation, attenuates oxidative stress, and prevents memory deficits. Conversely, targeted rAAV-mediated overexpression of Gal-3 in microglia is sufficient to recapitulate neuroinflammation, PV-interneuron injury, oscillatory abnormalities, and cognitive impairment. Finally, chemogenetic reactivation of hippocampal PV interneurons using DREADDs restores theta/gamma oscillations and ameliorates LPS-induced cognitive deficits. Together, our findings define a coherent pathogenic axis linking microglial Gal-3 upregulation to PV interneuron-dependent network desynchronization and highlight Gal-3 as a promising therapeutic target for inflammation-associated cognitive disorders.

items.title_cn: 小胶质细胞半乳糖凝集素 3 会破坏小清蛋白中间神经元和海马同步性，导致认知缺陷。
items.abstract_cn: 脓毒症相关脑病 (SAE) 是一种全身性炎症的破坏性神经并发症，影响大约 70% 的脓毒症患者。它不仅会增加死亡率，还会使幸存者出现持续的认知缺陷。然而，SAE 进展的机制仍不完全清楚。在这里，我们使用脂多糖 (LPS) 诱导的 SAE 小鼠模型，将小胶质细胞半乳糖凝集素 3 (Gal-3) 确定为驱动系统性炎症诱导的认知障碍的中心致病介质。从机制上讲，全身 LPS 攻击会强烈上调小胶质细胞 Gal-3，进而激活 Toll 样受体 2 (TLR2) 信号传导并促进 NLRP3/AIM2 炎性体组装。这种小胶质细胞驱动的炎症级联反应大大加剧了局部氧化应激，导致海马小白蛋白（PV）中间神经元选择性结构和功能损伤。这些关键中间神经元的功能障碍会扰乱 theta/gamma 振荡，损害兴奋/抑制 (E/I) 平衡和突触可塑性，并最终导致严重的认知能力下降。 TD139 对 Gal-3 的药理抑制支持这种致病级联，有效抑制 TLR2/炎性体激活，减轻氧化应激，并预防记忆缺陷。相反，小胶质细胞中 rAAV 介导的 Gal-3 靶向过度表达足以重现神经炎症、PV 中间神经元损伤、振荡异常和认知障碍。最后，使用 DREADD 对海马 PV 中间神经元进行化学遗传学重新激活，恢复 theta/gamma 振荡并改善 LPS 诱导的认知缺陷。总之，我们的研究结果定义了一个连贯的致病轴，将小胶质细胞 Gal-3 上调与 PV 中间神经元依赖性网络去同步联系起来，并强调 Gal-3 作为炎症相关认知障碍的有前途的治疗靶点。

items.title: Integrative multi-omics identifies lyn-mediated microglial activation as a key driver of central post-stroke pain.
items.authors: Yuying Zhao; Qingqing Han; Yujie Ding; Yu Du; Yan Li
items.abstract: Central post-stroke pain (CPSP) is a neuropathic pain condition that severely impairs patients' quality of life and recovery, yet its pathogenesis remains poorly understood. This study employed a multi-omics approach to investigate CPSP mechanisms in a mouse model generated by stereotaxic injection of collagenase IV into the thalamic ventral posterolateral nucleus (VPL). Pain-related behavioral tests confirmed successful model establishment and characterized associated behavioral deficits. Subsequent analyses using ELISA, qPCR, and immunofluorescence revealed elevated inflammatory cytokine levels and microglial activation in the VPL. Non-targeted metabolomics and transcriptomics further uncovered significant metabolic and gene expression changes in CPSP mice. Integrated multi-omics analysis identified the kinase Lyn as a key differentially expressed gene linked to these metabolic alterations, with its expression dynamically upregulated in CPSP mice. Lyn colocalized with activated microglia and promoted their shift toward a pro-inflammatory phenotype. Importantly, pharmacological inhibition of Lyn using Bafetinib attenuated pain hypersensitivity, suppressed microglial proliferation, and reduced inflammatory cytokine secretion in CPSP mice. These findings indicate that CPSP involves systemic metabolic and transcriptional dysregulation, and that Lyn-mediated microglial activation drives pain progression through enhanced neuroinflammation, highlighting Lyn as a potential therapeutic target for CPSP intervention.
items.title_en: Integrative multi-omics identifies lyn-mediated microglial activation as a key driver of central post-stroke pain.
items.title_cn: 综合多组学确定 lyn 介导的小胶质细胞激活是中风后中枢性疼痛的关键驱动因素。
items.abstract_cn: 中枢性中风后疼痛（CPSP）是一种神经性疼痛，严重损害患者的生活质量和康复，但其发病机制仍知之甚少。本研究采用多组学方法研究通过将胶原酶 IV 立体定向注射到丘脑腹侧后外侧核 (VPL) 生成的小鼠模型中的 CPSP 机制。疼痛相关的行为测试证实了模型的成功建立并表征了相关的行为缺陷。随后使用 ELISA、qPCR 和免疫荧光进行的分析显示，VPL 中炎症细胞因子水平升高且小胶质细胞活化。非靶向代谢组学和转录组学进一步揭示了 CPSP 小鼠的显着代谢和基因表达变化。综合多组学分析确定激酶 Lyn 是与这些代谢改变相关的关键差异表达基因，其表达在 CPSP 小鼠中动态上调。 Lyn 与激活的小胶质细胞共定位，并促进它们向促炎表型转变。重要的是，使用 Bafetinib 对 Lyn 进行药理抑制可减轻 CPSP 小鼠的疼痛超敏反应，抑制小胶质细胞增殖，并减少炎症细胞因子的分泌。这些发现表明 CPSP 涉及全身代谢和转录失调，并且 Lyn 介导的小胶质细胞激活通过增强的神经炎症驱动疼痛进展，突出显示 Lyn 作为 CPSP 干预的潜在治疗靶点。

items.title: 15-PGDH inhibition promotes muscle repair and strength recovery during GLP-1 receptor agonist-induced weight loss.
items.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
items.authors: Minas Nalbandian; Jameel Lone; Emmeran Le Moal; Ireh Kim; Kaitlin Jeuris; Yutong Kelly Li; Peggy Kraft; Meng Zhao
items.abstract: Glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists, including long-acting semaglutide, are transformative anti-obesity therapies. However, emerging evidence indicates that weight loss may come at the expense of skeletal muscle mass, a tissue essential for mobility, metabolic regulation, and overall health. Here, we show that inhibition of the gerozyme 15-hydroxyprostaglandin dehydrogenase (15-PGDH), a prostaglandin-degrading enzyme that increases with injury and aging, improves muscle repair and strength recovery in the presence of semaglutide. In a high fat diet-induced mouse model of obesity, semaglutide alone caused significant loss of muscle mass, while preserving contractile function. Following injury, obese mice exhibited pathological calcifications previously reported for the heritable myopathy, Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy. Semaglutide had both beneficial and deleterious effects, reducing calcific remodeling, but causing reduced regenerated myofiber sizes. This impaired regenerative myofiber growth in semaglutide-treated mice was surmounted by cotreatment with a 15-PGDH inhibitor (PGDHi), which stimulated muscle stem cell function and myofiber growth, leading to enhanced strength. Importantly, PGDHi synergizes with semaglutide to boost postinjury muscle quality and muscle force without compromising weight loss.
items.title_en: 15-PGDH inhibition promotes muscle repair and strength recovery during GLP-1 receptor agonist-induced weight loss.
items.title_cn: 在 GLP-1 受体激动剂诱导的减肥过程中，15-PGDH 抑制可促进肌肉修复和力量恢复。
items.abstract_cn: 胰高血糖素样肽 1 受体激动剂，包括长效索马鲁肽，是变革性的抗肥胖疗法。然而，新出现的证据表明，减肥可能会损害骨骼肌质量，而骨骼肌质量对于活动能力、代谢调节和整体健康至关重要。在这里，我们表明，在索马鲁肽存在的情况下，抑制Gerozyme 15-羟基前列腺素脱氢酶（15-PGDH）（一种随着损伤和衰老而增加的前列腺素降解酶）可以改善肌肉修复和力量恢复。在高脂肪饮食诱导的肥胖小鼠模型中，单独使用索马鲁肽会导致肌肉质量显着损失，同时保留收缩功能。受伤后，肥胖小鼠表现出先前报道的遗传性肌病杜氏肌营养不良症的病理性钙化。索马鲁肽既有有益作用，也有有害作用，减少钙化重塑，但导致再生肌纤维尺寸减少。接受索马鲁肽治疗的小鼠中，这种再生肌纤维生长受损的问题可以通过与 15-PGDH 抑制剂 (PGDHi) 共同治疗来克服，该抑制剂刺激肌肉干细胞功能和肌纤维生长，从而增强力量。重要的是，PGDHi 与索马鲁肽协同作用，可提高受伤后的肌肉质量和肌肉力量，而不影响减肥。

items.title: Omics-driven strategies for identifying biomarkers in Alzheimer's disease.
items.authors: Yumna Khan; Arcot Rekha; Suhas Ballal; Laxmidhar Maharana; Mudasir Maqbool; Kavita Goyal; Rakhi Mishra; Prerna Uniyal
items.abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder with limited treatment options, mainly due to late diagnosis and partial understanding of its molecular aspects. Traditional biomarker discovery approaches have significantly contributed to AD diagnostics but suffer from limitations. The advent of omics technologies (genomics, epigenomics, transcriptomics, proteomics, and metabolomics) has revolutionized the search for novel biomarkers by enabling comprehensive molecular profiling. Genomic studies have identified risk-associated variants such as APOE4, while epigenomic alterations, including DNA methylation alterations, offer insight into gene regulation in AD. Transcriptomic analyses, particularly single-cell and spatial transcriptomics, have uncovered molecular pathways linked to neuroinflammation and synaptic dysfunction. Proteomic advancements, including mass spectrometry and extracellular vesicle profiling, have identified potential blood- and CSF-based biomarkers for early-stage detection. Metabolomic and lipidomic studies indicate that cerebral glucose hypometabolism, insulin resistance, mitochondrial damage, redox imbalance, and disrupted lipid homeostasis are centra contributors to AD pathogenesis rather than secondary considerations of the disease. These metabolic dysfunctions may precede overt neurodegeneration and influence amyloid processing, tau phosphorylation, neuroinflammatory activation, and synaptic loss, thereby generating clinically informative biomarker signatures in blood and cerebrospinal fluid. Within this metabolism-centered paradigm, integrative multi-omics approaches are particularly valuable because they not only enhance biomarker specificity, but also connect molecular signatures with bioenergetic and immune-mediated mechanisms of disease. Accordingly, integrative multi-omics approaches improve biomarker specificity and predictive power, thereby supporting the development of precision medicine and targeted therapeutic interventions. Nevertheless, important challenges remain, including data integration, reproducibility, and clinical translation.
items.title_en: Omics-driven strategies for identifying biomarkers in Alzheimer's disease.
items.title_cn: 用于识别阿尔茨海默病生物标志物的组学驱动策略。
items.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病（AD）是一种进行性神经退行性疾病，治疗选择有限，主要是由于诊断较晚以及对其分子方面的了解不全面。传统的生物标志物发现方法对 AD 诊断做出了重大贡献，但也存在局限性。组学技术（基因组学、表观基因组学、转录组学、蛋白质组学和代谢组学）的出现通过实现全面的分子分析彻底改变了新型生物标志物的搜索。基因组研究已经确定了与风险相关的变异，例如 APOE4，而表观基因组改变，包括 DNA 甲基化改变，可以深入了解 AD 中的基因调控。转录组学分析，特别是单细胞和空间转录组学，揭示了与神经炎症和突触功能障碍相关的分子途径。蛋白质组学的进步，包括质谱分析和细胞外囊泡分析，已经确定了潜在的基于血液和脑脊液的生物标志物，用于早期检测。代谢组学和脂质组学研究表明，脑葡萄糖代谢低下、胰岛素抵抗、线粒体损伤、氧化还原失衡和脂质稳态破坏是 AD 发病机制的主要因素，而不是该疾病的次要考虑因素。这些代谢功能障碍可能先于明显的神经变性并影响淀粉样蛋白加工、tau 磷酸化、神经炎症激活和突触损失，从而在血液和脑脊液中产生具有临床信息的生物标志物特征。在这种以代谢为中心的范式中，综合多组学方法特别有价值，因为它们不仅增强生物标志物特异性，而且还将分子特征与生物能和免疫介导的疾病机制联系起来。因此，综合多组学方法提高了生物标志物的特异性和预测能力，从而支持精准医学和靶向治疗干预的发展。然而，重要的挑战仍然存在，包括数据集成、可重复性和临床转化。

items.title: Low-Level Light Therapy in Postherpetic Neuralgia: A Review of Mechanistic Insights and Clinical Implications.
items.authors: Yu-Chen Ma; Yu-Chieh Chiang; Sebastian Yu
items.abstract: Known as the most prevailing complication of herpes zoster (HZ), postherpetic neuralgia (PHN) can lead to long-term skin discomfort. Current medications for PHN remain suboptimal with incomplete relief and potential side effects. Low-level light therapy (LLLT) has been increasingly explored as a non-invasive modality for treating PHN, but the mechanistic basis and clinical implications have not been synthesized in a translational framework. In this review, we explore the pathophysiological mechanisms of PHN and the biological mechanisms of LLLT, integrating current mechanistic insights with available clinical evidence. We summarize the experimental and clinical literature evaluating LLLT for PHN and related neuropathic pain models, mainly focusing on mechanisms across peripheral tissues, dorsal root ganglia, and neuro-immune aspects, as we evaluate therapeutic parameters and outcomes from available clinical studies. Current evidence suggests that PHN is associated with dorsal root ganglion (DRG) inflammation, peripheral cutaneous neuroinflammation, loss of cutaneous innervation, and ion channel dysregulation. These changes comprehensively lead to hyperexcitable neurons with a lower sensory threshold. Across neuropathic pain models, LLLT elevates mechanical and thermal pain thresholds, attenuates inflammatory cytokine signaling, and promotes an immune cell phenotype shift toward an anti-inflammatory profile including M1-to-M2 macrophage polarization. LLLT also stabilizes membrane excitability by restoring Na⁺/K⁺-ATPase activity and modulating calcium dynamics, while supporting peripheral nerve repair via axonal regeneration. Clinically, administering LLLT to patients with PHN resulted in significant pain reduction, and early intervention may also reduce its incidence. By integrating experimental and clinical research, LLLT serves as a promising approach for PHN owing to its efficacy for anti-inflammation, neuronal regeneration and ion modulation.
items.title_en: Low-Level Light Therapy in Postherpetic Neuralgia: A Review of Mechanistic Insights and Clinical Implications.
items.title_cn: 带状疱疹后神经痛的低强度光疗法：机制见解和临床意义的回顾。
items.abstract_cn: 带状疱疹后神经痛 (PHN) 被称为带状疱疹 (HZ) 最常见的并发症，可导致长期皮肤不适。目前治疗 PHN 的药物仍然不够理想，无法完全缓解并有潜在的副作用。低强度光疗法 (LLLT) 作为一种非侵入性治疗 PHN 的方法已被越来越多地探索，但其机制基础和临床意义尚未在转化框架中得到综合。在这篇综述中，我们将当前的机制见解与现有的临床证据相结合，探讨 PHN 的病理生理机制和 LLLT 的生物学机制。我们总结了评估 LLLT 对 PHN 和相关神经病理性疼痛模型的实验和临床文献，主要关注外周组织、背根神经节和神经免疫方面的机制，同时我们评估现有临床研究的治疗参数和结果。目前的证据表明 PHN 与背根神经节 (DRG) 炎症、周围皮肤神经炎症、皮肤神经支配丧失和离子通道失调有关。这些变化全面导致神经元过度兴奋，感觉阈值降低。在神经病理性疼痛模型中，LLLT 可以提高机械痛和热痛阈值，减弱炎症细胞因子信号传导，并促进免疫细胞表型向抗炎模式转变，包括 M1 至 M2 巨噬细胞极化。 LLLT 还通过恢复 Na⁺/K⁺-ATP 酶活性和调节钙动力学来稳定膜兴奋性，同时通过轴突再生支持周围神经修复。临床上，对 PHN 患者进行 LLLT 可以显着减轻疼痛，早期干预也可能降低其发生率。通过整合实验和临床研究，LLLT 因其抗炎、神经元再生和离子调节功效而成为治疗 PHN 的一种有前景的方法。

核心发现：带状疱疹后神经痛 (PHN) 被称为带状疱疹 (HZ) 最常见的并发症，可导致长期皮肤不适。目前治疗 PHN 的药物仍然不够理想，无法完全缓解并有潜在的副作用。低强度光疗法 (LLLT) 作为一种非侵入性治疗 PHN 的方法已被越来越多地探索，但其机制基础和临床意义尚未在转化框架中得到综合。在这篇综述中，我们将当前的机制见解与现有的临床证据相结合，探讨 PHN 的病理生理机制和 LLLT 的生物学机制。我们总结了评估 LLLT 对 PHN 和相关神经病理性疼痛模型的实验和临床文献，主要关注外周组织、背根神经节和神经免疫方面的机制，同时我们评估现有临床研究的治疗参数和结果。目前的证据表明 PHN 与背根神经节 (DRG) 炎症、周围皮肤神经炎症、皮肤神经支配丧失和离子通道失调有关。这些变化全面导致神经元过度兴奋，感觉阈值降低。在神经病理性疼痛模型中，LLLT 可以提高机械痛和热痛阈值，减弱炎症细胞因子信号传导，并促进免疫细胞表型向抗炎模式转变，包括 M1 至 M2 巨噬细胞极化。 LLLT 还通过恢复 Na⁺/K⁺-ATP 酶活性和调节钙动力学来稳定膜兴奋性，同时通过轴突再生支持周围神经修复。临床上，对 PHN 患者进行 LLLT 可以显着减轻疼痛，早期干预也可能降低其发生率。通过整合实验和临床研究，LLLT 因其抗炎、神经元再生和离子调节功效而成为治疗 PHN 的一种有前景的方法。

临床/科研意义：建议重点核对研究对象、模型、干预方式、主要终点和局限性，再判断是否纳入综述或选题库。

小满点评：这是一条需要人工复核全文的候选文献，当前摘要层面不宜过度外推。

items.title: Machine learning and deep learning for neurological disease analysis: A systematic review across five major disorders.
items.authors: Kazi Nur Uddin; Partho Ghose; Ebrima Njie; Nafees Mahmood; Niloy Kumar; Md Nazmul Haque; Loveleen Gaur; Aimin Li
items.abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) has become integral to the research of neurological diseases due to the rapid expansion of neuroimaging, clinical, physiological, and wearable data. However, the concise synthesis of recent machine learning (ML) and deep learning (DL) remains limited. This systematic review analyzes studies published between January 2021 and March 2026 on five major conditions- Alzheimer's disease, stroke, Parkinson's disease, brain tumors, and traumatic brain injury (TBI)-following the PRISMA 2020 guidelines and a structured search of PubMed, Scopus, and Web of Science, yielding 206 eligible articles. The results show that convolutional and encoder-decoder architectures dominate imaging tasks, whereas hybrid and multimodal approaches increasingly combine imaging with clinical and sensor data. Emerging paradigms, including federated learning, self-supervised learning, and foundation models, address data scarcity, privacy, and cross-institutional variability. Key advances include high-performing transformer-based models for Alzheimer's diagnosis, real-time stroke detection by CT/MRI, improved Parkinson's detection by multimodal fusion, hybrid models for brain tumor classification, and outcome prediction in TBI. Despite these gains, challenges in generalizability, interpretability, and clinical translation persist, underscoring the need for more robust and clinically reliable AI systems to address these issues.
items.title_en: Machine learning and deep learning for neurological disease analysis: A systematic review across five major disorders.
items.title_cn: 用于神经系统疾病分析的机器学习和深度学习：对五种主要疾病的系统评价。
items.abstract_cn: 由于神经影像、临床、生理和可穿戴数据的快速扩展，人工智能 (AI) 已成为神经系统疾病研究不可或缺的一部分。然而，最近的机器学习（ML）和深度学习（DL）的简洁综合仍然有限。这篇系统综述分析了 2021 年 1 月至 2026 年 3 月期间发表的关于五种主要疾病（阿尔茨海默病、中风、帕金森病、脑肿瘤和创伤性脑损伤 (TBI)）的研究，遵循 PRISMA 2020 指南以及 PubMed、Scopus 和 Web of Science 的结构化搜索，产生了 206 篇合格文章。结果表明，卷积和编码器-解码器架构主导着成像任务，而混合和多模态方法越来越多地将成像与临床和传感器数据结合起来。新兴范式，包括联邦学习、自我监督学习和基础模型，解决了数据稀缺、隐私和跨机构可变性的问题。主要进展包括用于阿尔茨海默氏症诊断的高性能变压器模型、通过 CT/MRI 进行的实时中风检测、通过多模态融合改进帕金森氏症检测、脑肿瘤分类的混合模型以及 TBI 的结果预测。尽管取得了这些进展，但普遍性、可解释性和临床翻译方面的挑战仍然存在，这凸显了需要更强大、临床上可靠的人工智能系统来解决这些问题。

items.title: Adjusting Disease Risk Index for Regional Variations and Donor Selection.
items.authors: Makoto Iwasaki; Yachiyo Kuwatsuka; Hiromi Hayashi; Shinichi Kobayashi; Marie Ohbiki; Naoyuki Uchida; Noriko Doki; Takahiro Fukuda
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: The Disease Risk Index (DRI) is a widely used prognostic tool following hematopoietic stem cell transplantation (HSCT), based on disease classification and status. However, the refined DRI (rDRI) does not fully account for regional variations in disease distribution and treatment practices. OBJECTIVE: To refine the rDRI by accounting for underrepresented disease entities in the rDRI and by considering regional differences in HSCT treatment strategies, and to identify the most suitable donor selection strategy based on the newly developed disease risk criteria. STUDY DESIGN: We analyzed 7,720 patients with hematologic malignancies who underwent their first allogeneic HSCT between 2014 and 2016 and developed a region-adjusted DRI (raDRI) using the Japanese registry database. We then validated predictive performance in 5,108 patients transplanted between 2017 and 2018. RESULTS: The raDRI demonstrated superior accuracy compared with the rDRI (time-dependent AUC: 0.705 vs. 0.670; integrated calibration index: 0.016 vs. 0.017). In patients with low to intermediate raDRI, matched related donors (MRD) were associated with improved overall survival compared with matched unrelated bone marrow donors (bone marrow (BM): hazard ratio (HR) 0.50, 95% CI 0.26 - 0.96; peripheral blood (PB): HR 0.54, 95% CI 0.36-0.83), whereas no differences were seen in patients with high to very high raDRI (MRD-BM: HR 1.03, 95% CI 0.69 - 1.54, MRD-PB: 1.15, 95% CI 0.89-1.49). CONCLUSION: Our findings underscore that prognostic indices such as the DRI are inherently shaped by the populations and clinical practices from which they are derived. Regional differences in disease prevalence, treatment strategies, and donor-source utilization can substantially influence risk stratification and transplant outcomes.
items.title_en: Adjusting Disease Risk Index for Regional Variations and Donor Selection.
items.title_cn: 根据地区差异和捐助者选择调整疾病风险指数。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：疾病风险指数（DRI）是造血干细胞移植（HSCT）后广泛使用的预后工具，基于疾病分类和状态。然而，精细化 DRI (rDRI) 并未完全考虑疾病分布和治疗实践的区域差异。目的：通过考虑 rDRI 中代表性不足的疾病实体并考虑 HSCT 治疗策略的区域差异来完善 rDRI，并根据新制定的疾病风险标准确定最合适的供体选择策略。研究设计：我们分析了 2014 年至 2016 年间接受首次同种异体 HSCT 的 7,720 名血液恶性肿瘤患者，并使用日本注册数据库开发了区域调整 DRI (raDRI)。然后，我们验证了 2017 年至 2018 年间 5,108 名移植患者的预测性能。结果：与 rDRI 相比，raDRI 表现出更高的准确性（时间依赖性 AUC：0.705 与 0.670；综合校准指数：0.016 与 0.017）。在低至中度 raDRI 患者中，与匹配的无关骨髓供体相比，匹配的相关供体 (MRD) 与总体生存率改善相关（骨髓 (BM)：风险比 (HR) 0.50，95% CI 0.26 - 0.96；外周血 (PB)：HR 0.54，95% CI 0.36 - 0.83），而在高至极高的患者中没有发现差异raDRI（MRD-BM：HR 1.03，95% CI 0.69 - 1.54，MRD-PB：1.15，95% CI 0.89-1.49）。结论：我们的研究结果强调，DRI 等预后指标本质上是由其来源人群和临床实践决定的。疾病患病率、治疗策略和供体来源利用的地区差异可能会极大地影响风险分层和移植结果。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Tumor-targeted interferon-α gene therapy for glioblastoma: a phase 1 trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Bernhard Gentner; Marica Eoli; Francesca Farina; Matteo Barcella; Alessia Capotondo; Stefania Mazzoleni; Valentina Brambilla; Antonio Francavilla
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Glioblastoma (GBM) is an immunologically cold brain tumor with poor outcome, characterized by a myeloid-driven immunosuppressive microenvironment. Here we report an interim analysis of a first-in-human phase 1/2a dose-escalation study evaluating Temferon-a genetically engineered autologous stem cell transplant designed to deliver interferon-α2 by means of myeloid progeny recruited to the GBM TME and locally activate antitumor immunity. Twenty-four newly diagnosed patients with GBM and unmethylated MGMT promoter were treated across eight cohorts following surgical resection and radiotherapy, testing Temferon doses ranging from 0.5 × 106 to 4.0 × 106 CD34+ cells kg-1 and different conditioning regimens (BCNU or busulfan, with or without thiotepa). The primary endpoint was safety and tolerability within 90 days after infusion. Secondary endpoints included long-term safety, dose and conditioning regimen selection, Temferon engraftment, clinical response, quality of life and survival. No dose-limiting toxicities were observed up to the highest dose level of temferon tested. Busulfan conditioning was selected for further development. Adverse events included laboratory abnormalities, cytopenias and infections consistent with autologous stem cell transplant. Median overall survival and progression-free survival were 16.7 months and 8.1 months from diagnosis, respectively, with most patients maintaining good performance status and quality of life. Genetically engineered cells were detected long term in the bone marrow and the blood, where minimal amounts of interferon-α were measured. Temferon is a safe and tolerable immunotherapeutic strategy in patients with newly diagnosed GBM. ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT03866109 .
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Tumor-targeted interferon-α gene therapy for glioblastoma: a phase 1 trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤的肿瘤靶向干扰素-α 基因治疗：一项 1 期试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤（GBM）是一种免疫冷脑肿瘤，预后较差，其特点是髓系驱动的免疫抑制微环境。在此，我们报告了一项首次人体 1/2a 期剂量递增研究的中期分析，该研究评估了 Temferon——一种基因工程自体干细胞移植物，旨在通过招募到 GBM TME 的骨髓后代传递干扰素-α2，并局部激活抗肿瘤免疫。手术切除和放疗后，24 名新诊断的 GBM 和未甲基化 MGMT 启动子患者在 8 个队列中接受治疗，测试 Temferon 剂量范围为 0.5 × 106 至 4.0 × 106 CD34+ 细胞 kg-1 和不同的预处理方案（BCNU 或白消安，含或不含塞替派）。主要终点是输注后 90 天内的安全性和耐受性。次要终点包括长期安全性、剂量和预处理方案选择、Temferon 植入、临床反应、生活质量和生存率。在所测试的特铁龙最高剂量水平下，未观察到剂量限制性毒性。选择白消安调理进行进一步开发。不良事件包括与自体干细胞移植一致的实验室异常、血细胞减少和感染。诊断后中位总生存期和无进展生存期分别为 16.7 个月和 8.1 个月，大多数患者保持良好的体力状态和生活质量。在骨髓和血液中长期检测到基因工程细胞，并检测到极少量的干扰素-α。对于新诊断的 GBM 患者来说，Temferon 是一种安全且可耐受的免疫治疗策略。 ClinicalTrials.gov：NCT03866109。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: AETA peptide contributes to Alzheimer's disease signature of synapse dysfunction.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Jade Dunot; Carine Gandin; Marin Truchi; Giulia Pirro; Sébastien Moreno; Agathe Launay; Benjamin Azoulay; Hugo Landra
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD), the leading cause of dementia, is characterized by early synaptic dysfunction that precedes overt cognitive decline. While amyloid-β and Tau remain central to AD pathogenesis, molecular triggers of synapse weakening remain unclear. Here, we investigated AETA, a novel brain-secreted peptide derived from amyloid precursor protein (APP), as a potential mediator of synapse dysfunction in AD. We previously identified AETA as a unique modulator of NMDA receptor activity in the healthy brain; however, its role in AD etiology was yet to be explored. Post-mortem analyses of human hippocampal and prefrontal cortex tissues revealed significantly elevated AETA levels in AD patients, particularly in females. To further explore the contribution of AETA to AD synaptic pathology, we analyzed a new mouse model, the AETA-m mouse, exhibiting chronically increased brain AETA expression. Hippocampi of female AETA-m mice displayed an increase in the number of astrocyte and microglia, but no overt neuroinflammation. RNA sequencing of female AETA-m hippocampi revealed alterations in synaptic gene expression that closely paralleled those observed in vulnerable human AD brain regions, most notably in the hippocampus. These two phenotypes were absent in males. Functionally, hippocampal neurons from AETA-m mice displayed impaired NMDA receptor signaling, dendritic spine loss, and memory deficits especially in females, mirroring early AD-associated synaptic dysfunction. Together, these findings identify AETA as a novel key contributor of synaptic vulnerability in AD and associated memory processing, especially in females. Targeting AETA signaling may therefore offer new therapeutic avenues for preventing or mitigating synaptic and cognitive decline in AD.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: AETA peptide contributes to Alzheimer's disease signature of synapse dysfunction.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: AETA 肽导致阿尔茨海默病突触功能障碍的特征。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是痴呆症的主要原因，其特征是早期突触功能障碍，先于明显的认知能力下降。虽然β淀粉样蛋白和 Tau 蛋白仍然是 AD 发病机制的核心，但突触减弱的分子触发因素仍不清楚。在这里，我们研究了 AETA，一种源自淀粉样前体蛋白 (APP) 的新型脑分泌肽，作为 AD 突触功能障碍的潜在介质。我们之前发现 AETA 是健康大脑中 NMDA 受体活性的独特调节剂；然而，其在 AD 病因学中的作用仍有待探讨。对人类海马和前额皮质组织的尸检分析显示，AD 患者（尤其是女性）的 AETA 水平显着升高。为了进一步探讨 AETA 对 AD 突触病理学的贡献，我们分析了一种新的小鼠模型，即 AETA-m 小鼠，该模型表现出大脑 AETA 表达长期增加。雌性 AETA-m 小鼠的海马显示星形胶质细胞和小胶质细胞数量增加，但没有明显的神经炎症。女性 AETA-m 海马体的 RNA 测序揭示了突触基因表达的变化，这与在人类 AD 易受影响的大脑区域（尤其是海马体）中观察到的变化非常相似。这两种表型在男性中不存在。在功能上，AETA-m 小鼠的海马神经元表现出 NMDA 受体信号受损、树突棘缺失和记忆缺陷，尤其是在雌性小鼠中，反映了早期 AD 相关的突触功能障碍。总之，这些研究结果表明，AETA 是 AD 和相关记忆处理中突触脆弱性的一个新的关键因素，尤其是在女性中。因此，针对 AETA 信号传导可能为预防或减轻 AD 突触和认知能力下降提供新的治疗途径。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: EXOSC10 haploinsufficiency causes primary microcephaly by derepression of Sonic hedgehog signalling.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Pauline Antonie Ulmke; M Sadman Sakib; Dang Ton Nguyen; Asisa Muchamedin; Godwin Sokpor; Linh Pham; Yuanbin Xie; Eman Abbas
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: The evolutionarily conserved RNA exosome complex modulates gene expression during development. Mutations in RNA exosome complex subunits have been implicated in various human brain disorders, suggesting that defects in RNA decay are linked to impaired neural development. In our study, we identified de novo variants of EXOSC10 in microcephalic individuals. The patient's phenotype can be replicated by heterozygous conditional knockout of Exosc10 in the developing mouse forebrain. The heterozygous loss of Exosc10 in the developing mouse cortex leads to increased cell cycle exit, with a premature differentiation of radial glial cells to intermediate progenitors and neurons in the embryonic cortex. This premature neurogenesis at the expense of neural stem cell proliferation coincides with a smaller cortical size. RNA sequencing and RNA immunoprecipitation sequencing revealed upregulation of many Sonic hedgehog (Shh) signalling genes. We further show the direct degradation of Shh pathway transcripts such as Scube1 and Scube3 by Exosc10. In Exosc10 mouse mutants, the reduced cortical size could be largely rescued by reducing Shh activity. We propose that increased Shh activity due to Exosc10 deficiency leads to premature neurogenesis and ultimately to microcephaly. These observations offer new insights into the neurodevelopmental role of Exosc10 and highlight the dosage-dependent regulation of Shh signalling by Exosc10 in cortical development.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: EXOSC10 haploinsufficiency causes primary microcephaly by derepression of Sonic hedgehog signalling.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: EXOSC10 单倍体不足通过音刺猬信号传导的去抑制导致原发性小头畸形。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 进化上保守的 RNA 外泌体复合物在发育过程中调节基因表达。 RNA外泌体复合体亚基的突变与多种人类大脑疾病有关，这表明RNA衰变的缺陷与神经发育受损有关。在我们的研究中，我们在小头症个体中发现了 EXOSC10 的从头变异。通过在发育中的小鼠前脑中杂合条件性敲除 Exosc10，可以复制患者的表型。发育中的小鼠皮质中 Exosc10 的杂合缺失导致细胞周期退出增加，放射状胶质细胞过早分化为胚胎皮质中的中间祖细胞和神经元。这种以神经干细胞增殖为代价的过早神经发生与较小的皮质尺寸相一致。 RNA 测序和 RNA 免疫沉淀测序揭示了许多 Sonic Hedgehog (Shh) 信号基因的上调。我们进一步展示了 Exosc10 对 Shh 通路转录本（例如 Scube1 和 Scube3）的直接降解。在 Exosc10 小鼠突变体中，减少的皮质尺寸可以通过减少 Shh 活性来很大程度上挽救。我们认为，Exosc10 缺乏导致的 Shh 活性增加会导致过早的神经发生，并最终导致小头畸形。这些观察结果为 Exosc10 的神经发育作用提供了新的见解，并强调了 Exosc10 在皮质发育中对 Shh 信号传导的剂量依赖性调节。

核心发现：进化上保守的 RNA 外泌体复合物在发育过程中调节基因表达。 RNA外泌体复合体亚基的突变与多种人类大脑疾病有关，这表明RNA衰变的缺陷与神经发育受损有关。在我们的研究中，我们在小头症个体中发现了 EXOSC10 的从头变异。通过在发育中的小鼠前脑中杂合条件性敲除 Exosc10，可以复制患者的表型。发育中的小鼠皮质中 Exosc10 的杂合缺失导致细胞周期退出增加，放射状胶质细胞过早分化为胚胎皮质中的中间祖细胞和神经元。这种以神经干细胞增殖为代价的过早神经发生与较小的皮质尺寸相一致。 RNA 测序和 RNA 免疫沉淀测序揭示了许多 Sonic Hedgehog (Shh) 信号基因的上调。我们进一步展示了 Exosc10 对 Shh 通路转录本（例如 Scube1 和 Scube3）的直接降解。在 Exosc10 小鼠突变体中，减少的皮质尺寸可以通过减少 Shh 活性来很大程度上挽救。我们认为，Exosc10 缺乏导致的 Shh 活性增加会导致过早的神经发生，并最终导致小头畸形。这些观察结果为 Exosc10 的神经发育作用提供了新的见解，并强调了 Exosc10 在皮质发育中对 Shh 信号传导的剂量依赖性调节。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Human microglial transitions at the Aβ-tau inflection point associate with divergent pathways to dementia and resilience.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Ashley Lu; Wei-Ting Chen; Maria Dalby; Diego Sainz Garcia; Marisa Vanheusden; Luuk E de Vries; Veerle van Lieshout; Araks Martirosyan
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is not an inevitable outcome of pathology but a dynamic process shaped by how brain cells respond to amyloid-β (Aβ) and tau. To disentangle these responses, we combined spatial transcriptomics and single-nucleus RNA sequencing of the superior frontal cortex from octogenarians living with or without dementia and from cognitively intact centenarians with comparable Aβ accumulation. We identified six distinct tissue domains representing a spatial pathological continuum of AD, with a key inflection point marked by a shift from Aβ-associated inflammatory changes to tau-associated cellular programs. This transition was accompanied by a change in microglial states, from early inflammatory to late antigen-presenting phenotypes, termed early and late plaque-induced gene (PIG) programs. Resilient individuals showed distinct pathological patterns: octogenarians without dementia lacked late PIGs, whereas centenarians showed late PIG activation that was uncoupled from tau accumulation. Together, these findings highlight divergent resilience-associated mechanisms in human aging and position microglial state transitions at the Aβ-tau interface as candidate points of resilience with potential therapeutic relevance.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Human microglial transitions at the Aβ-tau inflection point associate with divergent pathways to dementia and resilience.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 人类小胶质细胞在 Aβ-tau 拐点处的转变与痴呆和恢复力的不同途径相关。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 并不是病理学不可避免的结果，而是脑细胞对淀粉样蛋白 - β (Aβ) 和 tau 蛋白的反应所形成的动态过程。为了解开这些反应，我们结合了空间转录组学和单核 RNA 测序，对患有或不患有痴呆症的八旬老人和具有相当 Aβ 积累的认知完整的百岁老人的上额叶皮层进行了测序。我们确定了代表 AD 空间病理连续体的六个不同组织域，其中一个关键拐点以从 Aβ 相关炎症变化到 tau 相关细胞程序的转变为标志。这种转变伴随着小胶质细胞状态的变化，从早期炎症到晚期抗原呈递表型，称为早期和晚期斑块诱导基因（PIG）程序。有复原力的个体表现出不同的病理模式：没有痴呆的八旬老人缺乏晚期 PIG，而百岁老人则表现出与 tau 积累无关的晚期 PIG 激活。总之，这些发现强调了人类衰老中与弹性相关的不同机制，并将 Aβ-tau 界面的小胶质细胞状态转变定位为具有潜在治疗相关性的弹性候选点。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Acquired genetic and cell-state changes in IDH-mutant glioma progression.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Kevin C Johnson; Avishay Spitzer; Frederick S Varn; Masashi Nomura; Luciano Garofano; Tamrin Chowdhury; Anuja Lipsa; Linbin Zhang
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Gliomas with mutant isocitrate dehydrogenase (IDH) are malignant brain tumours that typically arise in early to mid-adulthood and nearly always recur following treatment1,2. However, the genetic and cellular-state changes that drive IDH-mutant glioma progression under treatment remain incompletely understood. Here we integrated single-nucleus transcriptomic profiles, chromatin accessibility profiles and bulk DNA and RNA sequencing from 75 temporally separated gliomas across 35 patients comprising both the oligodendroglioma and astrocytoma IDH-mutant glioma tumour types. We show that malignant cell states transcriptionally resemble stages of normal glial-neuronal lineage development or a reactive mesenchymal-like state, mirroring states previously described in IDH wild-type glioblastoma3,4. Malignant cell states displayed distinct chromatin accessibility profiles that were comparable between both IDH-mutant glioma types. The abundance of less differentiated malignant cells increased with grade and with genetic alterations such as PDGFRA amplification. Longitudinal analysis highlighted two major malignant cell-state transition patterns. First, reduced lineage differentiation and increased proliferative malignant cells at recurrence were enriched in gliomas that acquired recurrence-associated genetic events. These included treatment-associated hypermutation, increased copy number changes and cell cycle alterations. Second, increased mesenchymal-like-state abundance occurred independently of acquired genetic alterations and instead coincided with elevated macrophage expression. Overall, our findings provide an integrative model that traces the cell intrinsic and extrinsic factors that shape cellular states during IDH-mutant glioma disease progression.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Acquired genetic and cell-state changes in IDH-mutant glioma progression.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: IDH 突变神经胶质瘤进展中获得性遗传和细胞状态变化。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 异柠檬酸脱氢酶 (IDH) 突变的神经胶质瘤是一种恶性脑肿瘤，通常出现在成年早期到中期，并且在治疗后几乎总是会复发1,2。然而，在治疗过程中驱动 IDH 突变神经胶质瘤进展的遗传和细胞状态变化仍不完全清楚。在这里，我们整合了 35 名患者的 75 个暂时分离的神经胶质瘤的单核转录组图谱、染色质可及性图谱以及批量 DNA 和 RNA 测序，这些患者包括少突胶质细胞瘤和星形细胞瘤 IDH 突变神经胶质瘤肿瘤类型。我们发现，恶性细胞状态在转录上类似于正常胶质神经元谱系发育阶段或反应性间充质样状态，反映了先前在 IDH 野生型胶质母细胞瘤中描述的状态3,4。恶性细胞状态显示出不同的染色质可及性特征，这在两种 IDH 突变神经胶质瘤类型之间具有可比性。分化程度较低的恶性细胞的丰度随着级别和遗传改变（例如 PDGFRA 扩增）的增加而增加。纵向分析强调了两种主要的恶性细胞状态转变模式。首先，复发时谱系分化减少和增殖性恶性细胞增加在获得复发相关遗传事件的神经胶质瘤中富集。这些包括与治疗相关的超突变、拷贝数变化增加和细胞周期改变。其次，间充质样状态丰度的增加与获得性遗传改变无关，而是与巨噬细胞表达的升高同时发生。总的来说，我们的研究结果提供了一个综合模型，可以追踪 IDH 突变神经胶质瘤疾病进展过程中塑造细胞状态的细胞内在和外在因素。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Brain-engrafted monocyte-derived macrophages from blood and skull-bone marrow exhibit distinct properties.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Siling Du; Feiya Ou; Antoine Drieu; Eric Z Xu; Yumeng Cheng; Steffen E Storck; Tornike Mamuladze; Jay Cao
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Microglia arise from yolk sac progenitors and are thought to persist throughout life with minimal input from adult hematopoiesis. However, whether brain-engrafted monocyte-derived macrophages (MDMs) exist at homeostasis and during turnover and how they function relative to yolk-sac-derived microglia (YSMs) remain unsettled. Here, we combine lineage tracing, pharmacological microglia depletion, and multi-omics profiling to define the ontogeny, identity, and function of brain parenchymal macrophages. Despite sharing the parenchymal milieu, MDMs display transcriptional and epigenetic landscapes distinct from YSMs. Fate-mapping reveals that brain-engrafted MDMs transiently express CD206, echoing a developmental stage of microglial precursors. MDM engraftment and polarization are modulated by interleukin (IL)-34 and C-C chemokine receptor 2 (CCR2). Furthermore, parabiosis and skull-flap transplantation reveal that both blood and skull marrow supply the niche, yielding origin-biased MDM states. Functionally, MDM engraftment enhances cuprizone-mediated demyelination. Together, our study defines the origins, molecular features, and context-dependent roles of brain parenchymal macrophages across homeostasis, turnover, and central nervous system (CNS) pathology.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Brain-engrafted monocyte-derived macrophages from blood and skull-bone marrow exhibit distinct properties.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 来自血液和颅骨骨髓的脑移植单核细胞衍生的巨噬细胞表现出独特的特性。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 小胶质细胞起源于卵黄囊祖细胞，被认为会在一生中持续存在，成人造血作用的输入极少。然而，植入大脑的单核细胞来源的巨噬细胞（MDM）是否存在于稳态和周转过程中，以及它们相对于卵黄囊来源的小胶质细胞（YSM）如何发挥作用仍然悬而未决。在这里，我们结合谱系追踪、药理学小胶质细胞耗竭和多组学分析来定义脑实质巨噬细胞的个体发育、身份和功能。尽管共享实质环境，但 MDM 表现出与 YSM 不同的转录和表观遗传景观。命运图谱显示，植入大脑的 MDM 短暂表达 CD206，与小胶质细胞前体的发育阶段相呼应。 MDM 植入和极化由白细胞介素 (IL)-34 和 C-C 趋化因子受体 2 (CCR2) 调节。此外，联体共生和颅骨瓣移植表明，血液和颅骨骨髓都提供了生态位，产生了起源偏向的 MDM 状态。从功能上讲，MDM 植入可增强铜宗介导的脱髓鞘作用。我们的研究共同定义了脑实质巨噬细胞在稳态、周转和中枢神经系统 (CNS) 病理学中的起源、分子特征和环境依赖性作用。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Evidence of skull bone translocator protein overexpression linked to multiple sclerosis progression.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Gianluca Corazzolla; Constantina A Treaba; Mehrbod Mohammadian; Ludovica Brusaferri; Valeria T Barletta; Nicole R Zürcher; Jacob M Hooker; Jacob A Sloane
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: The skull bone marrow contributes to brain immune homeostasis via recently discovered skull-meningeal channels, enabling the bidirectional trafficking of immune cells between skull bone and underlying dura mater. In multiple sclerosis, autoreactive T cells migrate to the bone marrow and shift its haematopoietic output towards myeloid differentiation, contributing to disease progression. However, the role of the skull bone marrow in multiple sclerosis pathophysiology, and its relationship to brain damage and clinical disability remain largely unexplored. We utilized simultaneous MR-PET with the second-generation radioligand ¹¹C-PBR28 to characterize within the skull bone of multiple sclerosis patients the in vivo expression of the translocator protein (TSPO), an 18-kDa mitochondrial membrane protein largely expressed by microglia, astrocytes, and peripheral myeloid cells. Sixty-five multiple sclerosis subjects (46 relapsing-remitting, 19 secondary progressive) and 26 healthy controls underwent ¹¹C-PBR28 MR-PET to acquire 60-90-min post-injection standardized uptake value maps and anatomical scans for brain volumetrics. Voxel-wise analyses of skull TSPO signal were conducted to assess group differences and associations with demographic, clinical and brain volumetrics. Voxel-wise analyses revealed a divergent association between age and skull TSPO signal, with a negative correlation in healthy controls in bilateral frontal and right parietal regions (r = -0.67, P < 0.001), and a positive correlation in multiple sclerosis patients in bilateral parietal and occipital skull bone regions (r = 0.44, P < 0.001). Compared to both healthy controls and relapsing-remitting multiple sclerosis, patients with secondary progressive multiple sclerosis showed widespread elevation in skull TSPO signal in frontal, parietal, temporal, occipital and skull base regions. No significant differences were detected between relapsing-remitting multiple sclerosis and healthy controls. Elevated skull TSPO signal was also observed in patients with more severe neurological disability, irrespective of clinical phenotype. Widespread skull TSPO expression was observed to be positively correlated with Expanded Disability Status Scale (EDSS) scores (ρ = 0.49, P < 0.001) while a negative association was observed with white matter volume (r = -0.45, P < 0.001) and Symbol Digit Modalities Test (SDMT) z-scores (r = -0.48, P < 0.001). In multivariable regression analysis, skull TSPO signal [β = 6.63, standard error (SE) = 1.92, P = 0.001] and T2-hyperintense white matter lesion volume (β = 0.34, SE = 0.14, P = 0.020) were independently associated with disability, while white matter, cortical and subcortical grey matter volumes did not retain statistical significance (all P > 0.550). We provide in vivo evidence of skull TSPO overexpression in multiple sclerosis, observed in progressive disease and associated with clinical disability and structural brain damage. Overall, these findings suggest a role for the skull bone marrow in disease-related processes and highlight its potential as a novel radiological marker and therapeutic target.

top_journal_neuroscience.title: SUR1-TRPM4 is expressed in human epilepsy and promotes neuron hyperactivity and seizures in rodents.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Mitchell B Moyer; Svetlana Ivanova; Kaspar Keledjian; Matthew Kreinbrink; Jenna Langbein; Penghua Yang; Darrian McAfee; Ujwal Boddeti
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: One-third of epilepsy patients do not achieve sufficient seizure freedom with current standard anti-seizure medications. Better understanding of the pathological mechanisms contributing to epileptogenesis is thus necessary to improve current therapies. SUR1-TRPM4 is a depolarizing ion channel minimally expressed in a healthy brain that is upregulated de novo in neurons and glia after epileptogenic CNS injuries such as traumatic brain injury and stroke. However, its role in epilepsy is not well understood. Here, we demonstrate using immunofluorescent microscopy that SUR1-TRPM4 expression is elevated in neurons within an electrographically sorted human epileptic brain compared with a non-epileptic brain obtained after resection from six drug-resistant temporal lobe epilepsy patients. Additionally, we utilized immunofluorescence and co-immunoprecipitation to observe that SUR1-TRPM4 is upregulated within the hippocampus and temporal cortex in mice after pentylenetetrazol (PTZ) kindling, a chronic model of rodent epilepsy. Pharmacologic inhibition of SUR1-TRPM4 using either the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA)-approved drug glyburide or 9-phenanthrol, as well as either constitutive or neuron-specific knockout of this channel, attenuated chronic seizure development in this model. Exogenous overexpression of SUR1-TRPM4 by plasmid transfection in neurons in vitro increased neuronal hyperexcitability in response to low Mg2+ stimulation, while pharmacologic inhibition of endogenous TRPM4 attenuated neuronal population hyperexcitation. Collectively, our results reveal that elevated SUR1-TRPM4 expression found in human and rodent epileptic neurons promotes chronic seizures by increasing neuronal excitation. These findings directly support clinical investigation of SUR1-TRPM4 inhibitors as potential anti-seizure therapies in epilepsy patients and suggest further investigations into the contribution of SUR1-TRPM4 to seizures induced by specific epileptogenic insults, such as traumatic brain injury (TBI), are warranted.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: SUR1-TRPM4 is expressed in human epilepsy and promotes neuron hyperactivity and seizures in rodents.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: SUR1-TRPM4 在人类癫痫中表达，并促进啮齿类动物的神经元过度活跃和癫痫发作。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 三分之一的癫痫患者使用当前的标准抗癫痫药物无法获得足够的癫痫发作自由度。因此，有必要更好地了解导致癫痫发生的病理机制，以改进当前的治疗方法。 SUR1-TRPM4 是一种在健康大脑中最低限度表达的去极化离子通道，在致癫痫性中枢神经系统损伤（例如创伤性脑损伤和中风）后，其在神经元和神经胶质细胞中从头开始上调。然而，其在癫痫中的作用尚不清楚。在这里，我们使用免疫荧光显微镜证明，与从六名耐药颞叶癫痫患者切除后获得的非癫痫大脑相比，电图分选的人类癫痫大脑中的神经元中的 SUR1-TRPM4 表达升高。此外，我们利用免疫荧光和免疫共沉淀观察到，在戊四氮 (PTZ) 点燃（一种啮齿动物癫痫慢性模型）后，小鼠海马和颞叶皮质内的 SUR1-TRPM4 上调。使用美国食品和药物管理局 (FDA) 批准的药物格列本脲或 9-菲罗对 SUR1-TRPM4 进行药理学抑制，以及对该通道进行组成型或神经元特异性敲除，可减轻该模型中慢性癫痫发作的发展。通过质粒转染在神经元中外源性过度表达 SUR1-TRPM4，增加了神经元对低 Mg2+ 刺激的过度兴奋性，而内源性 TRPM4 的药理学抑制则减弱了神经元群的过度兴奋性。总的来说，我们的结果表明，在人类和啮齿动物癫痫神经元中发现的 SUR1-TRPM4 表达升高通过增加神经元兴奋来促进慢性癫痫发作。这些发现直接支持了 SUR1-TRPM4 抑制剂作为癫痫患者潜在抗癫痫治疗的临床研究，并表明有必要进一步研究 SUR1-TRPM4 对特定致痫性损伤（如创伤性脑损伤 (TBI)）引起的癫痫发作的影响。

global_hot_topics.title: Treadmill exercise attenuates neuroinflammation in APP/PS1 mice via gut microbiota remodeling: Evidence from fecal microbiota transplantation.
global_hot_topics.authors: Shunling Yuan; Lihan Lin; Jiaxin Liu; Qi Lin; Shaobing Wang; Jiyou Wu; Diqun Xu; Yiping Liu
global_hot_topics.abstract: Alzheimer's disease is associated with gut microbiota dysbiosis, intestinal barrier dysfunction, lipopolysaccharide (LPS) translocation, and neuroinflammation. However, it is unclear whether exercise-induced gut microbiota remodeling causally contributes to the neuroprotective effects of exercise in AD. Herein, APP/PS1 mice underwent 12 weeks of treadmill exercise, and fecal microbiota transplantation (FMT) was used to determine whether exercise-related benefits could be transferred to the recipient mice. Behavioral performance was assessed using the Morris water maze and open-field test. Gut microbial profiles were analyzed by 16S rDNA sequencing. Intestinal barrier integrity was evaluated using histology, AB-PAS staining, and tight-junction protein expression, while plasma and brain LPS levels were measured by enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay. Neuroinflammation was examined with immunofluorescence and Western blotting. It was found that treadmill exercise improved spatial learning, memory, and anxiety-like behavior in APP/PS1 mice. These benefits were partly reproduced in recipients of microbiota from exercised donors. Exercise also restored gut microbial diversity and composition, increased the abundance of taxa including Dubosiella and UBA1819, alleviated colonic injury, enhanced mucus secretion, upregulated ZO-1, Occludin, and Claudin-1, and reduced plasma and brain LPS levels. In parallel, exercise and FMT from exercised donors decreased brain TLR4 expression, attenuated microglial and astrocytic activation, and suppressed TLR4/NF-κB signaling and downstream inflammatory cytokines. These findings indicate that treadmill exercise alleviates neuroinflammation in APP/PS1 mice, at least in part, through gut microbiota remodeling, improved intestinal barrier integrity, and reduced LPS-driven inflammatory signaling.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Treadmill exercise attenuates neuroinflammation in APP/PS1 mice via gut microbiota remodeling: Evidence from fecal microbiota transplantation.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 跑步机运动通过肠道微生物群重塑减轻 APP/PS1 小鼠的神经炎症：来自粪便微生物群移植的证据。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病与肠道微生物群失调、肠道屏障功能障碍、脂多糖 (LPS) 易位和神经炎症有关。然而，目前尚不清楚运动引起的肠道微生物群重塑是否会导致运动对 AD 的神经保护作用。在此，APP/PS1 小鼠接受了 12 周的跑步机运动，并使用粪便微生物移植 (FMT) 来确定运动相关的益处是否可以转移到受体小鼠身上。使用莫里斯水迷宫和旷场测试评估行为表现。通过 16S rDNA 测序分析肠道微生物谱。使用组织学、AB-PAS 染色和紧密连接蛋白表达来评估肠屏障完整性，同时通过酶联免疫吸附测定来测量血浆和脑 LPS 水平。通过免疫荧光和蛋白质印迹检查神经炎症。研究发现，跑步机运动可以改善 APP/PS1 小鼠的空间学习、记忆和类焦虑行为。这些益处在接受锻炼的捐赠者的微生物群的接受者身上得到了部分再现。运动还可以恢复肠道微生物多样性和组成，增加包括 Dubosiella 和 UBA1819 在内的类群丰度，减轻结肠损伤，增强粘液分泌，上调 ZO-1、Occludin 和 Claudin-1，并降低血浆和大脑 LPS 水平。与此同时，运动供体的运动和 FMT 降低了大脑 TLR4 表达，减弱了小胶质细胞和星形胶质细胞的激活，并抑制了 TLR4/NF-κB 信号传导和下游炎症细胞因子。这些发现表明，跑步机运动至少部分通过肠道微生物群重塑、改善肠道屏障完整性和减少 LPS 驱动的炎症信号传导来减轻 APP/PS1 小鼠的神经炎症。

global_hot_topics.title: Uric acid alleviates the inflammatory response in LPS-induced BV2 cells and MPTP-induced PD mice by resisting ferroptosis through the Nrf2 signalling pathway.
global_hot_topics.journal: Redox report : communications in free radical research
global_hot_topics.authors: Dongmei Zhou; Tian Xiong; Bing Yang; Fanjie Liu; Xianglai Mo; Ting Chen; Peipei Lu; Xinghuan Liang
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: Neuroinflammation, oxidative stress, and ferroptosis are implicated in Parkinson' s disease (PD) pathogenesis. Epidemiological studies suggest that elevated uric acid (UA) levels may reduce PD risk, but the precise molecular mechanisms involved remain unclear. In this study, we investigated the effects of UA in lipopolysaccharide (LPS) or MPP+-stimulated BV2 microglia and MPTP-induced PD mouse models. METHODS: BV2 cells are recognized as a standardized and reproducible neural inflammatory cell model for mechanism exploration. The anti-ferroptosis and anti-inflammatory effects of UA were assessed in LPS or MPP+ stimulated BV2 microglia and in an MPTP-induced PD mouse model. Western blot, qPCR, ELISA, and immunofluorescence were used to analyse the expression of inflammasome-related markers. ROS, MDA, GSH, and Fe²⁺ levels were measured using testing kits, while mitochondrial ultrastructure was evaluated through transmission electron microscopy. PD-related markers were assessed by ethology and immunohistochemistry. The Nrf2 inhibitor ML385 was employed to validate pathway specificity. RESULTS: We found that UA treatment reduced the expression of proinflammatory cytokines (TNF-α, IL-6, and IL-1β), ROS production, lipid peroxidation, and intracellular Fe²⁺ in BV2 microglia while increasing the antioxidant capacity and preserving the mitochondrial ultrastructure. In MPTP-treated mice, UA improved motor performance, preserved dopaminergic neuron density in the substantia nigra, and reduced neuroinflammation. UA activated Nrf2 signalling and upregulated GPX4 expression, which were attenuated by ML385, confirming the Nrf2 dependence of these effects. CONCLUSION: UA alleviates ferroptosis and neuroinflammation in LPS or MPP+ stimulated BV2 microglia and MPTP-induced PD mouse models through the activation of the Nrf2 signalling pathway.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Uric acid alleviates the inflammatory response in LPS-induced BV2 cells and MPTP-induced PD mice by resisting ferroptosis through the Nrf2 signalling pathway.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 尿酸通过 Nrf2 信号通路抵抗铁死亡，减轻 LPS 诱导的 BV2 细胞和 MPTP 诱导的 PD 小鼠的炎症反应。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：神经炎症、氧化应激和铁死亡与帕金森病 (PD) 发病机制有关。流行病学研究表明，尿酸（UA）水平升高可能会降低帕金森病的风险，但其确切的分子机制仍不清楚。在这项研究中，我们研究了 UA 对脂多糖 (LPS) 或 MPP+ 刺激的 BV2 小胶质细胞和 MPTP 诱导的 PD 小鼠模型的影响。方法：BV2 细胞被认为是用于机制探索的标准化且可重复的神经炎症细胞模型。在 LPS 或 MPP+ 刺激的 BV2 小胶质细胞和 MPTP 诱导的 PD 小鼠模型中评估了 UA 的抗铁死亡和抗炎作用。采用Western blot、qPCR、ELISA和免疫荧光分析炎症小体相关标志物的表达。使用测试套件测量 ROS、MDA、GSH 和 Fe2+ 水平，同时通过透射电子显微镜评估线粒体超微结构。通过行为学和免疫组织化学评估 PD 相关标志物。 Nrf2 抑制剂 ML385 用于验证通路特异性。结果：我们发现 UA 治疗减少了 BV2 小胶质细胞中促炎细胞因子（TNF-α、IL-6 和 IL-1β）的表达、ROS 产生、脂质过氧化和细胞内 Fe2+，同时增加了抗氧化能力并保留了线粒体超微结构。在 MPTP 治疗的小鼠中，UA 改善了运动表现，保留了黑质中的多巴胺能神经元密度，并减少了神经炎症。 UA 激活 Nrf2 信号传导并上调 GPX4 表达，而 ML385 减弱了这些作用，证实了这些作用的 Nrf2 依赖性。结论：UA 通过激活 Nrf2 信号通路，减轻 LPS 或 MPP+ 刺激的 BV2 小胶质细胞和 MPTP 诱导的 PD 小鼠模型中的铁死亡和神经炎症。

global_hot_topics.title: Impact of concurrent cancers on survival of patients with newly diagnosed glioblastoma.
global_hot_topics.authors: Bujung Hong; Hind Chaib; Yuriy Tsoy; Gonzalo Moros; Maria Kipele; Hans E Heissler; Gunter Ziegenhardt; Christian Mawrin
global_hot_topics.abstract: OBJECTIVE: In patients with glioblastoma (GBM), the presence of other primary malignancies in different organs appears to be associated with a reduced survival rate compared to patients with GBM alone. This study aimed to evaluate how the presence of additional simultaneous cancers affects the survival outcomes of patients newly diagnosed with GBM. METHODS: A cohort of 141 adults with newly diagnosed GBM was analyzed, including 19 (13.5%) with concurrent cancer (GBM.cc) and 122 (86.5%) without (GBM.only). Clinical characteristics, treatment, and survival were compared between groups. Cox proportional hazard regression was used to assess the impact of concurrent cancer, age, MGMT promoter methylation status, and sex on survival. RESULTS: Patients with GBM.cc were older than those with GBM.only (p = .005, while median KPS and treatment approaches were comparable. All tumors were IDH-wildtype; MGMT promoter methylation was present in 56% of cases. Median OS was 16 months in GBM.cc versus 12 months in GBM.only (p = .418), and median PFI was 13 versus 8 months (p = .225). GBM.cc was associated with a reduced hazard of death (p = .012) and a trend toward longer PFI (p = .055). Increasing age independently predicted worse OS (p < .001) and shorter PFI (p = .009), whereas MGMT methylation showed a non-significant trend toward improved OS (p = .201). Sex was not an independent predictor of OS (p = .726) and was not associated with PFI (p = .703). CONCLUSION: Concurrent cancers do not appear to adversely affect survival outcomes or probabilities compared with GBM alone, within the limits of statistical power. Age remained a strong independent predictor of both PFI and OS, regardless of concurrent cancers or sex.

global_hot_topics.title: Minimally invasive suboccipital tubular resection of large posterior fossa metastases: Early ventricular decompression and low CSF diversion rates.
global_hot_topics.authors: Gabrielle Dituri; Michelle S Miller; Joseph Keen; Naser Ibrahim; Smruti Mahapatra; Joseph Lockwood; Marcus L Ware
global_hot_topics.abstract: OBJECTIVE: Posterior fossa metastases carry a high risk of brainstem compression and obstructive hydrocephalus, with no consensus on optimal perioperative cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) diversion. We evaluated early fourth ventricular decompression, CSF diversion, and perioperative outcomes following minimally invasive tubular resection in patients with relatively large tumors. METHODS: We performed a retrospective single-center study of 29 consecutive adults undergoing minimally invasive suboccipital tubular resection of previously untreated posterior fossa metastases. Primary outcomes were postoperative CSF diversion and early ventricular decompression. In the absence of a comparator cohort, outcomes were interpreted relative to published series. RESULTS: The median tumor volume was 11.4 cm³ (IQR, 10.1-17.8 cm³). Preoperative hydrocephalus was present in 48% of patients, and 55% had high-grade fourth ventricular compression. Within 24 h postoperatively, high-grade compression decreased to 21%, with 79% demonstrating mild or no residual compression. Among patients with preoperative hydrocephalus, 64% showed early improvement. Postoperative CSF diversion was uncommon: no patients required external ventricular drainage, and one patient (3%) required ventriculoperitoneal shunting. Gross-total resection was achieved in 72% of evaluable cases, with operative strategy prioritizing safe decompression. Ninety percent of patients were stable or improved at discharge, with a median length of stay of 3 days. There were no CSF leaks, infections, or postoperative hemorrhages. Thirty-day mortality was 7%. CONCLUSION: Minimally invasive tubular resection enables effective decompression of relatively large posterior fossa metastases with low CSF diversion rates. These findings are hypothesis-generating, and comparative studies are required to define the role of this approach relative to conventional techniques.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Minimally invasive suboccipital tubular resection of large posterior fossa metastases: Early ventricular decompression and low CSF diversion rates.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 枕骨下管状大切除术治疗大后颅窝转移瘤：早期脑室减压和低脑脊液分流率。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 目的：颅后窝转移具有脑干受压和梗阻性脑积水的高风险，但对于最佳围手术期脑脊液（CSF）分流尚无共识。我们评估了肿瘤相对较大的患者进行微创肾小管切除术后的早期第四脑室减压、脑脊液分流和围手术期结局。方法：我们对连续 29 名成人进行了一项回顾性单中心研究，这些成人对先前未经治疗的后颅窝转移瘤接受了微创枕下管状切除术。主要结局是术后脑脊液改道和早期心室减压。在没有比较队列的情况下，结果是相对于已发表的系列进行解释的。结果：中位肿瘤体积为 11.4 cm3（IQR，10.1-17.8 cm3）。 48% 的患者术前存在脑积水，55% 的患者有严重的第四脑室受压。术后 24 小时内，高级别压缩率下降至 21%，其中 79% 表现出轻度或无残余压缩。在术前脑积水的患者中，64% 的患者表现出早期改善。术后脑脊液改道并不常见：没有患者需要脑室外引流，一名患者（3%）需要脑室腹腔分流术。 72% 的可评估病例实现了大体全切除，手术策略优先考虑安全减压。 90% 的患者出院时病情稳定或有所改善，中位住院时间为 3 天。没有发生脑脊液漏、感染或术后出血。 30 天死亡率为 7%。结论：微创管状切除术能够有效地对较大的后颅窝转移瘤进行减压，且脑脊液分流率较低。这些发现是假设生成的，需要进行比较研究来确定这种方法相对于传统技术的作用。

核心发现：目的：颅后窝转移具有脑干受压和梗阻性脑积水的高风险，但对于最佳围手术期脑脊液（CSF）分流尚无共识。我们评估了肿瘤相对较大的患者进行微创肾小管切除术后的早期第四脑室减压、脑脊液分流和围手术期结局。方法：我们对连续 29 名成人进行了一项回顾性单中心研究，这些成人对先前未经治疗的后颅窝转移瘤接受了微创枕下管状切除术。主要结局是术后脑脊液改道和早期心室减压。在没有比较队列的情况下，结果是相对于已发表的系列进行解释的。结果：中位肿瘤体积为 11.4 cm3（IQR，10.1-17.8 cm3）。 48% 的患者术前存在脑积水，55% 的患者有严重的第四脑室受压。术后 24 小时内，高级别压缩率下降至 21%，其中 79% 表现出轻度或无残余压缩。在术前脑积水的患者中，64% 的患者表现出早期改善。术后脑脊液改道并不常见：没有患者需要脑室外引流，一名患者（3%）需要脑室腹腔分流术。 72% 的可评估病例实现了大体全切除，手术策略优先考虑安全减压。 90% 的患者出院时病情稳定或有所改善，中位住院时间为 3 天。没有发生脑脊液漏、感染或术后出血。 30 天死亡率为 7%。结论：微创管状切除术能够有效地对较大的后颅窝转移瘤进行减压，且脑脊液分流率较低。这些发现是假设生成的，需要进行比较研究来确定这种方法相对于传统技术的作用。

global_hot_topics.title: A recurrent interferon, stress, and survival axis identifies a rare malignant programme across glioblastoma single-cell, spatial, and longitudinal cohorts.
global_hot_topics.authors: Emmanuel Pio Pastore; Francesco De Rango
global_hot_topics.abstract: Glioblastoma exhibits profound intratumoral heterogeneity and rapid adaptation under stress, complicating durable therapeutic control. Here, a biologically grounded transcriptional axis is defined by three complementary modules capturing type I interferon signalling, immediate-early stress response, and pro-survival signalling enriched in unfolded protein response components. Using this equal-weighted axis, a rare axis-high programme was identified in a glioblastoma training cohort (GSE173278; 75,075 cells after filtering; 5.95% prevalence) and mapped to external cohorts through marker-anchored cohort-specific clusters. To enable reproducible detection, an interpretable 40-gene regularised logistic regression classifier was trained using fold-internal panel selection and Platt calibration fitted strictly on out-of-fold predictions. The conservative out-of-fold training evaluation showed informative discrimination and good probability calibration (AUC 0.767, AP 0.116, Brier 0.055, ECE 0.011). When the final model was applied to marker-anchored operational labels, ranking performance was high in an independent glioblastoma cohort (GSE131928; AUC 0.950, AP 0.351) and in an exploratory pan-cancer transfer setting (GSE203612; AUC 0.944, AP 0.343), although calibration slopes indicated dataset-dependent probability-scale shift. Longitudinal CARE glioblastoma samples showed that recalibration on T1 samples improved probability-scale reliability on later T2/T3 samples without changing rank discrimination. Spatial stratification based on available sample annotations linked higher detector probabilities to necrotic, bulk, and tumour-region samples. Irradiation feature-count contrasts supported positive shifts of the 40-gene panel and axis-related modules, while cell-level treated/control summaries were interpreted as context-specific perturbational evidence. Together, these results define a rare axis-high glioblastoma programme and provide a recalibratable gene-panel detector for probability-guided experimental triage and mechanistic follow-up.
global_hot_topics.title_en: A recurrent interferon, stress, and survival axis identifies a rare malignant programme across glioblastoma single-cell, spatial, and longitudinal cohorts.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 复发性干扰素、应激和生存轴确定了胶质母细胞瘤单细胞、空间和纵向队列中的罕见恶性程序。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤表现出深刻的瘤内异质性和应激下的快速适应，使持久的治疗控制变得复杂。在这里，生物基础转录轴由三个互补模块定义，这些模块捕获 I 型干扰素信号传导、早期应激反应和富含未折叠蛋白反应成分的促生存信号传导。使用这个等权重轴，在胶质母细胞瘤训练队列（GSE173278；过滤后有 75,075 个细胞；患病率 5.95%）中识别出罕见的轴高程序，并通过标记锚定的特定队列簇映射到外部队列。为了实现可重复的检测，使用折叠内部面板选择和严格符合折叠外预测的 Platt 校准来训练可解释的 40 基因正则化逻辑回归分类器。保守的折叠训练评估显示出信息辨别力和良好的概率校准（AUC 0.767、AP 0.116、Brier 0.055、ECE 0.011）。当最终模型应用于标记锚定的操作标签时，在独立的胶质母细胞瘤队列（GSE131928；AUC 0.950，AP 0.351）和探索性泛癌转移环境（GSE203612；AUC 0.944，AP 0.343）中排名表现较高，尽管校准斜率表明数据集依赖性概率尺度变化。纵向 CARE 胶质母细胞瘤样本表明，对 T1 样本进行重新校准可提高后来的 T2/T3 样本的概率尺度可靠性，而不会改变等级区分。基于可用样本注释的空间分层将更高的检测器概率与坏死、块状和肿瘤区域样本联系起来。辐照特征计数对比支持 40 基因组和轴相关模块的正向变化，而细胞水平处理/对照摘要被解释为特定背景的扰动证据。总之，这些结果定义了一种罕见的轴高胶质母细胞瘤计划，并为概率引导的实验分类和机械随访提供了可重新校准的基因组检测器。

global_hot_topics.title: Local delivery of SBRT and IL-12 to murine PDAC tumors modulates hematopoiesis.
global_hot_topics.authors: Tara G Vrooman; Emily R Quarato; Gary Hannon; Noah A Salama; Maggie L Lesch; Angela L Hughson; Vedika S Chandak; Nataliia Vdovichenko
global_hot_topics.abstract: Standard of care radiotherapy and chemotherapy have shown limited efficacy in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC). Immunotherapy has emerged as a promising treatment but has been hindered by systemic toxicities. A shift from systemic to localized delivery has reduced adverse effects and improved response rates in various cancers. However, the impact of tumor-targeted therapies on distant tissues, such as the bone marrow, remains underexplored. In a murine model of PDAC, we treated tumors with targeted stereotactic body radiation therapy (SBRT) and intratumoral interleukin-12 mRNA (IL-12). We evaluated tumor, blood, and bone marrow cells for therapy-induced changes over a period of 13 d to 13 months. Our results showed that while SBRT/IL-12 locally eradicated primary tumors, it also induced significant effects in the bone marrow. Early effects included acute lymphopenia in the blood and an immunostimulatory response in the bone marrow, leading to increased hematopoiesis. Long-term effects involved a reduction in hematopoietic stem cells (HSCs) and a shift towards a myeloid lineage, suggesting potential premature aging of the HSC population. These findings highlight the profound impact of localized SBRT/IL-12 therapy on distal bone marrow, emphasizing the need for further investigation into the long-term immunological consequences of localized cancer treatments.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Local delivery of SBRT and IL-12 to murine PDAC tumors modulates hematopoiesis.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: SBRT 和 IL-12 局部递送至小鼠 PDAC 肿瘤可调节造血功能。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 标准放疗和化疗对胰腺导管腺癌 (PDAC) 的疗效有限。免疫疗法已成为一种有前途的治疗方法，但受到全身毒性的阻碍。从全身给药到局部给药的转变减少了各种癌症的不良反应并提高了反应率。然而，肿瘤靶向治疗对骨髓等远处组织的影响仍未得到充分研究。在 PDAC 小鼠模型中，我们采用靶向立体定向放射治疗 (SBRT) 和瘤内白细胞介素 12 mRNA (IL-12) 治疗肿瘤。我们评估了 13 天至 13 个月期间肿瘤、血液和骨髓细胞因治疗引起的变化。我们的结果表明，虽然 SBRT/IL-12 局部根除原发性肿瘤，但它也对骨髓产生显着影响。早期影响包括血液中的急性淋巴细胞减少和骨髓中的免疫刺激反应，导致造血增加。长期影响涉及造血干细胞 (HSC) 的减少和向骨髓谱系的转变，这表明 HSC 群体可能出现过早衰老。这些发现强调了局部 SBRT/IL-12 治疗对远端骨髓的深远影响，强调需要进一步研究局部癌症治疗的长期免疫学后果。

global_hot_topics.title: Leveraging the bacteria for enhanced cancer immunotherapy: from a perspective of synthetic biology.
global_hot_topics.authors: Xing Liu; Hejin Zhang; Renchun Du; Zixu Liu; Yunyun Ren; Xiao Yang
global_hot_topics.abstract: In recent years, synthetic biology has been widely applied to engineer and program cellular behaviors. Using this approach, bacteria can be designed to express immunotherapeutic agents, improve tumor targeting, and deliver therapeutic payloads directly to tumor sites. To further improve efficacy, strategies such as hypoxia-responsive promoters, bacterial swarming, and extracellular vesicles (EVs) have been investigated, along with the synergistic effects of combining bacterial therapy with other treatments (e.g., photodynamic therapy, chemotherapy, immune checkpoint inhibitors). This review summarizes recent advances in synthetic biology for bacteria-based cancer immunotherapies, focusing on how bacterial agents activate the immune system and the engineering strategies used to achieve tumor targeting.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Leveraging the bacteria for enhanced cancer immunotherapy: from a perspective of synthetic biology.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 利用细菌增强癌症免疫治疗：从合成生物学的角度来看。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 近年来，合成生物学已广泛应用于细胞行为的工程和编程。使用这种方法，细菌可以被设计来表达免疫治疗剂，改善肿瘤靶向，并将治疗有效负载直接传递到肿瘤部位。为了进一步提高疗效，人们对缺氧反应启动子、细菌群聚和细胞外囊泡（EV）等策略以及细菌疗法与其他疗法（例如光动力疗法、化疗、免疫检查点抑制剂）相结合的协同效应进行了研究。这篇综述总结了基于细菌的癌症免疫疗法的合成生物学的最新进展，重点关注细菌制剂如何激活免疫系统以及用于实现肿瘤靶向的工程策略。

global_hot_topics.title: Ubiquitination-anchored signature defines neuroendocrine prostate cancer: hub genes and single-cell ecosystem insights from integrated bioinformatics analysis of public transcriptomic datasets.
global_hot_topics.journal: The aging male : the official journal of the International Society for the Study of the Aging Male
global_hot_topics.authors: Zhenkun Zhao; Lei Qiu; Ziang Li; Jialong Wu; Qianyang Ni; Sijie Li; Hongyin Wang; Chengdong Shi
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: Neuroendocrine prostate cancer (NEPC) is an aggressive, treatment-refractory state that often emerges under androgen-receptor pathway inhibition. We hypothesized that dysregulated ubiquitination underpins NEPC lineage plasticity and that integrating bulk and single-cell transcriptomes would define a ubiquitination-centered signature and tumor microenvironment (TME) circuits of diagnostic and therapeutic relevance. METHODS: Public bulk transcriptomic datasets were combined to compare NEPC with prostate adenocarcinoma, including a GEO discovery cohort of 49 tissue samples from GSE32967 and GSE104786, and intersected with a curated ubiquitination-related gene universe to derive ubiquitination-related differentially expressed genes (URDEGs). Co-expression networks, functional enrichment, and protein-protein interaction (PPI) network topology analyses were used to identify and prioritize candidate hub genes. An independent scRNA-seq cohort was integrated for biological contextualization to map cellular lineages, hub gene localization, and intercellular communication. RESULTS: We identified 317 URDEGs that clearly segregated NEPC from conventional prostate cancer and clustered into NEPC-associated modules enriched for cell-cycle and mitotic programs. Network integration yielded an 11-gene hub panel, including AURKA, CCNA2, EZH2, FGFR1, and TTK. In the single-cell dataset, 25,325 cells were retained after quality control, and UMAP resolved 17 clusters annotated into 8 major lineages. Single-cell mapping further revealed lineage-biased hub gene expression and highlighted a prominent stromal-vascular as well as immune MIF-CD74/CXCR4 signaling axis. CONCLUSIONS: This integrative analysis identifies a ubiquitination‑anchored transcriptomic signature and associated hub‑gene network that are consistently associated with NEPC in public bulk datasets and supported by cell‑type-resolved patterns in an independent scRNA‑seq cohort; these findings nominate candidate biomarkers and therapeutic hypotheses that warrant external validation in prospectively collected, clinically annotated cohorts with protein‑level assessment. Our analysis defines a ubiquitination-anchored gene signature that distinguishes treatment-induced NEPC from conventional prostate cancer, supporting more accurate classification of aggressive, therapy-resistant disease.Identified hub genes show strong diagnostic performance and are measurable in routine samples, providing realistic candidates for biomarker panels and companion diagnostics.Single-cell mapping of the tumor microenvironment highlights stromal–vascular crosstalk and a MIF–CD74/CXCR4 immune axis as potentially druggable communication hubs beyond tumor cells alone.These findings support integrating multi-omics profiling into care pathways and trials for advanced prostate cancer to detect NEPC early, guide treatment choice, and prioritize patients for targeted therapies.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Ubiquitination-anchored signature defines neuroendocrine prostate cancer: hub genes and single-cell ecosystem insights from integrated bioinformatics analysis of public transcriptomic datasets.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 泛素化锚定特征定义了神经内分泌前列腺癌：来自公共转录组数据集的综合生物信息学分析的中心基因和单细胞生态系统见解。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：神经内分泌前列腺癌（NEPC）是一种侵袭性、治疗难治性状态，通常在雄激素受体途径抑制下出现。我们假设泛素化失调是 NEPC 谱系可塑性的基础，并且整合大量和单细胞转录组将定义以泛素化为中心的特征以及具有诊断和治疗相关性的肿瘤微环境 (TME) 回路。方法：将公共大量转录组数据集组合起来，比较 NEPC 与前列腺癌，包括来自 GSE32967 和 GSE104786 的 49 个组织样本的 GEO 发现队列，并与精心设计的泛素化相关基因宇宙相交叉，得出泛素化相关差异表达基因 (URDEG)。使用共表达网络、功能富集和蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用（PPI）网络拓扑分析来识别和优先考虑候选中心基因。整合了一个独立的 scRNA-seq 队列来进行生物背景分析，以绘制细胞谱系、中枢基因定位和细胞间通讯。结果：我们鉴定了 317 个 URDEG，它们将 NEPC 与传统前列腺癌明确分离，并聚集成富含细胞周期和有丝分裂程序的 NEPC 相关模块。网络整合产生了 11 个基因的 hub panel，包括 AURKA、CCNA2、EZH2、FGFR1 和 TTK。在单细胞数据集中，质量控制后保留了 25,325 个细胞，UMAP 解析了 17 个簇，注释为 8 个主要谱系。单细胞图谱进一步揭示了谱系偏向的中枢基因表达，并突出显示了显着的基质血管以及免疫 MIF-CD74/CXCR4 信号轴。结论：这项综合分析确定了泛素化锚定的转录组特征和相关的中心基因网络，它们与公共批量数据集中的 NEPC 一致相关，并得到独立 scRNA-seq 队列中细胞类型解析模式的支持；这些发现提名了候选生物标志物和治疗假设，需要在前瞻性收集、临床注释的队列中进行外部验证，并进行蛋白质水平评估。我们的分析定义了泛素化锚定……

medical_news.title: New depression treatment targets the immune system instead of the brain
medical_news.abstract: A surprising new approach to depression treatment is showing early promise — not by targeting brain chemicals, but by calming the immune system. In a small clinical trial, researchers found that an anti-inflammatory drug normally used for rheumatoid arthritis appeared to ease symptoms in people with hard-to-treat depression, while also reducing fatigue and anxiety and improving quality of life.

medical_news.title: Scientists finally crack an “undruggable” pancreatic cancer target and nearly double survival
medical_news.abstract: For decades, pancreatic cancer has been one of the most lethal cancers, with few effective treatment options. A new drug, daraxonrasib, targets the KRAS mutation that fuels most pancreatic tumors—something many scientists once thought couldn't be done. In a major clinical trial, the treatment nearly doubled survival for patients with advanced disease and reduced the risk of death by 60%.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists finally crack an “undruggable” pancreatic cancer target and nearly double survival
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家们终于破解了“无法药物治疗”的胰腺癌目标，使生存率几乎翻倍

medical_news.title: Ozempic and similar weight-loss drugs linked to 30% lower breast cancer risk
medical_news.abstract: A large study found that women taking GLP-1 drugs, the medication class behind Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, and Zepbound, were about 30% less likely to develop breast cancer. Researchers say the findings are promising but not yet proof, and clinical trials are now being planned to test whether these drugs could help prevent breast cancer.

medical_news.title: Scientists discover why ozempic may not work for some people
medical_news.abstract: Scientists have identified genetic variants that may make some people less responsive to GLP-1 drugs used to treat Type 2 diabetes. Roughly 10% of the population carries these variants, which appear to cause a mysterious form of "GLP-1 resistance." In several clinical trials, carriers were significantly less likely to reach healthy blood sugar targets while taking GLP-1 medications.

medical_news.title: Scientists create supercharged vitamin K that helps the brain heal itself
medical_news.abstract: Scientists in Japan have created powerful new vitamin K-based compounds that may help the brain regenerate lost neurons — a breakthrough that could one day change how diseases like Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s are treated. By combining vitamin K with components related to vitamin A, the researchers developed compounds that were about three times more effective at turning neural stem cells into neurons than natural vitamin K alone.

medical_news.title: CBD may slow Alzheimer’s by calming the brain’s immune system
medical_news.abstract: CBD may be doing far more than just easing pain or anxiety — new research suggests it could help fight Alzheimer’s disease by calming the brain’s runaway immune response. In experiments using Alzheimer’s mice, scientists found that inhaled CBD reduced key drivers of neuroinflammation, a damaging process increasingly linked to memory loss and brain degeneration.
medical_news.title_en: CBD may slow Alzheimer’s by calming the brain’s immune system

medical_news.abstract_cn: CBD 的作用可能远不止缓解疼痛或焦虑——新的研究表明，它可以通过平息大脑失控的免疫反应来帮助对抗阿尔茨海默病。在使用阿尔茨海默氏症小鼠进行的实验中，科学家发现吸入 CBD 可以减少神经炎症的关键驱动因素，神经炎症是一种与记忆丧失和大脑退化日益相关的破坏性过程。

medical_news.title: This new diabetes pill burns fat without the downsides of Ozempic
medical_news.abstract: Scientists have developed an experimental diabetes and obesity pill that works in a completely different way from drugs like Ozempic. Rather than reducing hunger, it activates metabolism in skeletal muscle, helping lower blood sugar and increase fat burning while preserving muscle mass. Early clinical results suggest the treatment is safe and well tolerated.

medical_news.title: Scientists reverse anxiety by fixing a tiny brain circuit
medical_news.abstract: A newly identified group of amygdala neurons appears to play a central role in anxiety and social behavior. Restoring normal activity in this tiny brain circuit reversed anxiety and social deficits in mice, revealing a promising new target for future treatments.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists reverse anxiety by fixing a tiny brain circuit
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家通过修复微小的大脑回路来逆转焦虑

medical_news.title: Scientists say they’ve reversed brain aging with a simple nasal spray
medical_news.abstract: Researchers at Texas A&M have developed a nasal spray that appears to reverse brain aging by calming inflammation and restoring the brain’s energy systems. After just two doses, memory and cognitive function improved for months, raising hopes for future treatments targeting dementia and brain fog.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists say they’ve reversed brain aging with a simple nasal spray
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家表示，他们通过简单的鼻喷雾剂逆转了大脑衰老
medical_news.abstract_cn: 德克萨斯农工大学的研究人员开发了一种鼻喷雾剂，它似乎可以通过平息炎症和恢复大脑的能量系统来逆转大脑衰老。仅服用两次剂量后，记忆和认知功能就得到了几个月的改善，这为未来针对痴呆和脑雾的治疗带来了希望。
